body.title: Rename theigors/ palace namespace to unseenuniversity/
body.result: 1007 palace nodes renamed theigors/* → unseenuniversity/*; all code + skill files updated; 0 theigors/ refs remain in source
body.description:
Palace paths like theigors/rules/database, theigors/skills/*, theigors/glossary are confusing to anyone who did not know the old name. The repo is now UnseenUniversity; the palace namespace should match.

Rename: all theigors/* palace nodes → unseenuniversity/*. Skills that do memory_get(path="theigors/rules/...") must also be updated.

**Affected files:** Postgres memory_palace table, ~/.claude/skills/ (any that reference theigors/ paths)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; migration must be idempotent; old paths can be left as alias stubs for one cycle
**Scope boundary:** IN: theigors/rules/*, theigors/skills/*, theigors/glossary → unseenuniversity/*; update skill files that call memory_get on old paths. OUT: content changes (only path rename), palace.projects.*, palace.days.*
**Completion criteria:** no palace node path starts with theigors/; all skill memory_get calls use unseenuniversity/ paths; Igor boots without errors
